title: desmanthus subulatus
intro: Desmanthus subulatus, also known as false fleabane or narrow-leaved desmanthus, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Desmanthus subulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
